intake._identity_lock_note: use_identity_lock=false because matilda_identity_lock.json uses references.meta_demo_presenter (not talent_avatar), which resolve_refs cannot find. avatar_reference provided directly. Permanent fix: add talent_avatar.url to matilda_identity_lock.json after uploading avatar to x.ai files API.

config.voice_suffix: clear precise mid-register voice, European-accented English, measured documentary presenter, synthetic performer only

shots.speech_text: I'm MATILDA. I'm a synthetic presenter — generated, not filmed.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @Matilda-001: identical presenter face, warm ash-gold blonde updo bun with face-framing wisps, same direct eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. Wardrobe: navy single-button blazer, white open-collar shirt, grey tailored trousers, black pointed-toe heels, gold watch left wrist. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Warehouse-Industrial-001: identical industrial loft — same window grid camera-left, same concrete floor, same brick tone, same beam geometry — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Documentary-Prestige-001: documentary prestige grade — rich midtones, restrained contrast, natural skin texture, subtle film grain, trustworthy broadcast gravitas, no beauty-filter smoothing, no Instagram saturation. MATILDA at DC, weight centered, upright authority posture. Direct eye-line to lens — first address to camera. (@1, warehouse loft — window grid camera-left, brick wall soft behind, concrete floor, metal beams above.) Camera: locked MCU — head and shoulders, presenter frame. Industrial window 4800K directional key locked — dust motes optional, deep shadow pockets, no magenta brick bounce, no cool fill contamination, zero hue drift. Motivated practical key only — no unmotivated beauty dish, no fashion rim, lamp or window must be visible or implied. COLOR LOCK Warehouse: brick #8B4A3B desaturated, concrete #A8A8A8, metal #5C5C5C, window light warm-neutral 4800K — no purple shadows, no teal concrete, no neon practicals. GRADE LOCK Documentary-Prestige: natural skin at generation — neutral WB, blue channel preserved; forbid global orange push, forbid yellow-green cast, forbid blue-starved shadows, forbid magenta midtones. MAGENTA SUPPRESS @Matilda-001: D65 neutral white balance 5000K on presenter face and blazer — frame-wide midtones R≈G≈B within 8%; fair blonde skin reads natural warm-neutral, NOT pink or magenta; navy blazer holds true deep navy, NOT purple; no pink ambient spill; gold watch stays amber-warm, not orange-magenta; no beauty-filter smoothing. GRADE: desaturated cinema precision — cool-neutral palette, teal-grey shadow base, muted European skin tones, no warmth or amber, shadow detail preserved, high sharpness, zero beauty filter. Bright industrial loft window key 4800K — single directional source, no fill. Corporate authority read at elevated exposure. Controlled contrast — detail in shadows, clean highlights. Fincher institutional daytime precision. Slow motivated push-in or locked-off medium; handheld only for insert B-roll — never jitter on host. Lip-synced, delivers: "I'm MATILDA. I'm a synthetic presenter — generated, not filmed." clear precise mid-register voice, European-accented English, measured documentary presenter, synthetic performer only. Finish on gesture peak (hand motion or lean), never hold dead stillness or dead frame.
